properties.sql: WITH per_source AS (SELECT SPLIT_PART(c_account_path, '.', 1) AS source_code, c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, SUM(CASE WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'debit'  THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS committed_in_period, SUM(CASE WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%.EXPENSED' AND c_direction = 'debit'  THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%.EXPENSED' AND c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS expensed_in_period, count(DISTINCT c_correlation_id) FILTER (WHERE c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'debit') AS beneficiary_count FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%' AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated >= NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp) AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')   IS NULL OR datecreated <  NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day') GROUP BY SPLIT_PART(c_account_path, '.', 1), c_envelope_code) SELECT (es.c_code || ':' || es.c_envelope_code) AS id, COALESCE(es.c_source_name, ps.source_code) AS donor_name, COALESCE(es.c_donor_class, '—') AS donor_class, ps.envelope_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, env.c_programme_code, ps.envelope_code) AS programme_name, COALESCE(es.c_share_percent, '—') || '%' AS share_pct_disp, to_char(COALESCE(CAST(es.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS allocated_disp, to_char(COALESCE(ps.committed_in_period, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS committed_in_period_disp, to_char(COALESCE(ps.expensed_in_period,  0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS expensed_in_period_disp, COALESCE(ps.beneficiary_count, 0) AS beneficiary_count FROM per_source ps LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope_source es ON es.c_code = ps.source_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_code = ps.envelope_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = env.c_programme_code WHERE COALESCE(ps.committed_in_period, 0) <> 0 OR COALESCE(ps.expensed_in_period, 0) <> 0 ORDER BY donor_name, ps.envelope_code
properties.countSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT (SPLIT_PART(c_account_path, '.', 1), c_envelope_code)) FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_account_path LIKE 'SRC_%'
